steps.title: Use statement word order
steps.content: The phrase we know that introduces a noun clause. Because the whole sentence is a statement, the clause after that needs normal subject-verb order and should end with a period.

steps.title: Reject question forms
steps.content: Choice A uses question word order and a question mark. Choice C keeps the inverted question word order even though it ends with a period. Choice D uses statement word order but incorrectly ends with a question mark. The answer is B.
